name: Interaction-Aware Whole-Body Control for Compliant Object Transport
summary: arXiv:2603.03751v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Cooperative object transport in unstructured environments remains challenging for assistive humanoids because strong, time-varying interact...
description: arXiv:2603.03751v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Cooperative object transport in unstructured environments remains challenging for assistive humanoids because strong, time-varying interaction forces can make tracking-centric whole-body control unreliable, especially in close-contact support tasks. This paper proposes a bio-inspired, interaction-oriented whole-body control (IO-WBC) that...
author: Hao Zhang, Yves Tseng, Ding Zhao, H. Eric Tseng
